SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-18-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-18-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER ELLEN ROSENTHAL PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UMANZOR, OTTO ORLANDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNTI, GREG DBA BELLA VITA GARDEN DESIGN $2,235.92 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,235.92, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES FOR REPAIR, TOWING, STORAGE AND LOSS OF USE. DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT FOR ANY PAYMENT PREVIOUSLY MADE ON THIS CLAIM ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
